category_sources: source_facts.description says LocalStack is a fully functional local AWS cloud stack.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is localstack; source_facts.homepage is the official LocalStack website using LocalStack branding.
docs_sources: Official LocalStack docs page is a dedicated documentation domain and describes LocalStack as a local cloud emulator for building and testing cloud applications.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LocalStack GitHub organization lists localstack/localstack as the open-source repository for the local AWS cloud stack.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a local AWS cloud stack; official LocalStack docs describe local cloud emulation for development and testing.
